steps.title: Add the equations to find 6y
steps.content:
Add both equations to eliminate $x$:
$(20x + 18y) + (-20x + 18y) = 18 + 18$
$36y = 36$
$y = 1$, so $6y = 6$.

steps.title: Subtract the equations to find 4x
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate $y$:
$(20x + 18y) - (-20x + 18y) = 18 - 18$
$40x = 0$
$x = 0$, so $4x = 0$.

steps.title: Compute the target expression
steps.content: $4x + 6y = 0 + 6 = 6$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
